user.title: Connect your ChatGPT account
user.description:
[Open the authentication page]({url}) and sign in with the ChatGPT account you want to monitor.

After you approve access, the browser may show a localhost connection error. This is expected. Copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect your ChatGPT account
reauth_confirm.description:
Your ChatGPT account needs to be authenticated again.

[Open the authentication page]({url}) and sign in again. After you approve access, the browser may show a localhost connection error. This is expected. Copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to OpenAI. Try again in a few moments.
error.invalid_auth: The authorization code was rejected or has expired. Open the authentication page again and try again.
error.missing_code: Enter the authorization code or redirect URL.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Try again.

abort.already_configured: This ChatGPT account is already configured.
